# Literature Review Protocol

Use this template only after the linked research-question intake is approved,
marked `selected`, and has `literature_status: ready`.

- Included study designs:

## Sources

Register each bibliographic or full-text source through data governance before
automated ingestion, storage, embedding, AI processing, or publication.

| Source | Purpose | Access class | Search date | Searcher |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PubMed | Bibliographic discovery | To be registered | | |
| ClinicalTrials.gov | Trial discovery | To be registered | | |

Add domain-specific sources only when their terms and intended use are approved.

## Reproducible searches

Record each search exactly as executed.

| Search ID | Source | Exact query | Filters | Executed at | Results |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: |
| S01 | | | | | |

Preserve source-export files, query parameters, API versions, result counts,
timestamps, and checksums outside Git when they contain bulk records.

### Screening

- Duplicate-resolution method:
- Title/abstract reviewers:
- Full-text reviewers:
- Conflict-resolution method:
- Exclusion-reason vocabulary:

## Extraction

Extract at minimum:

- stable identifier and citation;
- population and setting;
- study design and sample size;
- exposure, intervention, and comparator;
- endpoint definition and follow-up;
- effect estimate, uncertainty, and adjustment set;
- missingness and attrition;
- subgroup and multiplicity handling;
- funding, conflicts, and limitations;
- passages supporting or contradicting relevant claims.

## Quality and applicability

- Risk-of-bias instrument:
- Evidence-quality framework:
- Applicability to the intended NaS population:
- Data or cohort overlap assessment:
- Publication-bias assessment:

## Synthesis

- Planned quantitative synthesis:
- Planned narrative synthesis:
- Heterogeneity handling:
- Contradictory evidence handling:
- Null-finding handling:
- Rules for abstaining from a conclusion:

## AI use

AI may assist with deduplication, screening suggestions, structured extraction,
and synthesis drafts only when source permissions allow. Human reviewers verify
all included studies, extracted numbers, citations, and substantive claims.
Model output is never a source.
